upstream_note: v2: full 6x6. Top-level cells are the openai-egress row for v1 compatibility; the full grid is under upstreams.<egress>.cells keyed by ingress dialect.

openai.verdict_note: HTTP 200, passthrough (same dialect, no translation required); round trip to the mock's openai endpoint confirmed

openai-responses.verdict_note: HTTP 400 on POST /v1/responses: bad no Responses envelope (output/output_text/type=response)

anthropic.verdict_note: HTTP 400 on POST /v1/messages: bad no anthropic envelope ("type":"message" + content array)

gemini.verdict_note: HTTP 400 on POST /v1beta/models/openai/gpt-4o-mini:generateContent: bad no candidates[0].content

cohere.verdict_note: HTTP 400 on POST /v2/chat: bad no cohere v2 chat envelope (message.content or text)

bedrock.verdict_note: HTTP 400 on POST /model/openai/gpt-4o-mini/converse: bad no output.message.content (Converse)

hardware: AWS m7g.2xlarge (Graviton3, 8 cores / 32 GB). Gateway pinned to 4 cores, mock+loadgen on the other 4, Ubuntu 24.04. One dedicated box per gateway.
